slides.headline: 78% of EU dental clinics overpay for supplies.
slides.body: Most don't know it. Brokers, fragmented suppliers, and old habits keep margins thin.

slides.headline: Fragmented suppliers, opaque pricing.
slides.body: Same composite, four prices, three currencies. Nobody benchmarks across borders — until now.

slides.headline: Brokers keep the spread.
slides.body: Distributors mark up 15–40% before the box even arrives. A clinic ordering monthly bleeds €12k+ a year.

slides.headline: DentalBridge benchmarks every order.
slides.body: We compare your invoices against EU-wide pricing data and route you to verified suppliers — no broker layer.

slides.headline: Send us last month's invoice. We'll show you the leak.
slides.body: Reply to this post or DM 'AUDIT' — we'll send the report within 48 hours.
